notes: Computer may attempt one repair per turn, or give DM+1 to an attempt; at TL12 can purchase additional attempt for twice the Rating and Cost.
Imposes DM-1 on incoming fire; every two TLs higher, can purchase an additional DM-1, to maximum DM-3 at TL13.
Ship computer may fire one weapon; for each additional weapon TL is increased by 1. Can also sacrifice a weapon to give DM+1 to another attack. Maximum five weapons.
Governs Jump drives up to a given Jump number (Jn); TL same as required for that Jump number.
Provides jump plot from one specific world to a specific destination. Price based on parsecs; one-use program.
